Data_explore_Annotations

Nicole Hill

04/11/2021

Image data

  1. Distribution of area and image quality by: survey, institute, platform - need this info added to image metadata- Jan
  2. Temporal (and spatial) distribution of images- need date for temporal distribution- Jan
  3. Histogram of Distance between images (need to think about how to avoid going over land)-TO DO

Biological Data

  1. prevalence of each biological taxa (will help inform any aggregation). DONE
  2. key taxa spatial bubbleplots
  3. Any platform -related effects?? Need platform and image level data
  4. GAMS with env data- TO Do once narrowed down species to look at.
